form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 3rd over 515m at Sandown beaten 7 lengths (30.11) behind Hoppy in a Grade 5 on April 2. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 3rd over 515m at Sandown beaten 7 lengths (30.11) behind Hoppy in a Grade 5 on April 2. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.48) when seventh over 450m at Ballarat in a Grade 4/5. Has three wins and six placings from 13 starts from the draw. Looks one of the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (25.48) when seventh over 450m at Ballarat in a Grade 4/5. Has three wins and six placings from 13 starts from the draw. Looks one of the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Colliding and fell in catching pen.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 1.75 lengths fourth (30.33) over 525m at this track. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 1.75 lengths fourth (30.33) over 525m at this track. Forward showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning out of back straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (30.48) over 525m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need to find best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (30.48) over 525m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by 1.3 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at Bendigo, recording a flying 27.93 over the 500m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by 1.3 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at Bendigo, recording a flying 27.93 over the 500m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 1.3 lengths third over 525m this track in 30.29. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: Finished second last time (30.40) over 525m at this track. Wide draw here. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 7 lengths behind Spring Miles over 525m. Can't recommend against this lot.
